description: Dynamic coverage todo list from cov/coverage_todo_plan.json
name: mctp_assembler_v3-coverage

tasks.activeForm: Audit SSOT function and cycle coverage against RTL simulation evidence
tasks.content: Audit SSOT function and cycle coverage against RTL simulation evidence
tasks.criteria: check_tb_sim_evidence exits 0, ssot_coverage_summary exits 0, coverage.json status is pass/ok, and function/cycle bins meet target.
tasks.detail: Coverage approval comes from SSOT coverage bins matched to scoreboard rows observed from RTL simulation, not raw model-only hits.

todo_completion.reason: [coverage] PASS - SSOT functional coverage summary approved

tasks.activeForm: Record coverage limitations instead of approving unsupported proof
tasks.content: Record coverage limitations instead of approving unsupported proof
tasks.criteria: coverage.json limitations is empty for pass, or each limitation is surfaced in human_review_needed.
tasks.detail: If a coverage adapter cannot prove a bin, keep the stage blocked or human_review_needed with limitations attached.
